name: Flathub
description: Central repository for Flatpak applications — the primary distribution hub for sandboxed Linux desktop apps.

seo.title: Flathub — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Flathub: Central repository for Flatpak applications — the primary distribution hub for sandboxed Linux desktop apps.

when_to_use: Publish sandboxed Linux desktop apps to 1M+ users
Automated Flatpak build and distribution pipeline
Discover and install apps across all major distros
Automated update delivery for published applications

pros: De facto app store for modern Linux desktops
Strong branding and visibility for publishers
cons: Manifest review can be slow and finicky
Sandbox breaks some apps without Portals work
Runtime versions pinned, adds migration work
review.verdict: Where you publish Linux desktop apps in 2026 if you want real distribution and sandboxing.
review.best_for: Desktop app developers targeting modern Linux users across distros.
review.not_for: CLI tools, daemons, or apps that fight against sandboxing.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
